videos.title: Elegant Futuristic Reading Room
videos.prompt: Futuristic reading room interior with plush overstuffed chaise lounge, floor-to-ceiling built-in bookcases, warm high-CRI reading lamp, cozy wood fireplace, acoustic wall panels, soft leather footrest, hand-knotted Persian rug, potted snake plant, antique globe, stacked leather-bound classic novels, cup of hot tea on coaster, vintage magnifying glass, candle-lit mood, elegant tracking shot, photorealistic architectural visualization, curated with glowing polymethyl methacrylate, carbon fiber, seamless liquid metal, curved fiberglass, evoking a sci-fi, avant-garde, ultra-modern, high-tech, dreamlike feeling, elegant atmosphere, ultra realistic interior render.
